creator: gugod@gugod.ath.cx
text:
If you both install editors/xemacs-package and 
	editors/apel-xemacs21-mule , you 'll get a warning when opening
	xemacs :

(1) (warning/warning) Autoload error in:
/usr/local/lib/xemacs/xemacs-packages/lisp/apel/auto-autoloads:
	Already loaded

	Using xemacs21-mule , the packages is
	seprarted from source  now.  But apel is both in xemacs-packages
	and apel-<EMACS-CLONE>.  I installed mail/wanderlust-xemacs21-mule
	and it require apel-xemacs21-mule , and it won't work with the
	one in xemacs-packages.

Fix: 

Update xemacs-packages, delete apel or update that.
	Or let xemacs-packages be a meta-port.
How-To-Repeat: 	Just install xemacs-package , apel-xemacs21-mule
